title: Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services:
Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services!
